commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Run diagnostics on the FFlow CLI environment.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Interactively initializes a new FFlow workflow project.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Runs a C# file inside the official .NET 10 SDK Docker container.

options.name: --root
options.description: The root directory to use for the script execution.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Comma-separated list of additional files or directories to
include in the container.
